Motoin To Compel Pltf'S Compliance With Physical Examination Demand
Off Calendar May-16-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Bradley J. Jameson, Esq., PHILLIPS, SPALLAS & ANGSTADT 278-9400, appearing for defendants/moving parties Teresa Philpott and Ivan Sequeira
Elizabeth Ferrall, Esq., FOREMAN & BRASSO 433-3475, appearing for plaintiff/opposing party

RULING:
Argued and TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant's motion to compel a physical examination is granted. The examination by Dr. Klein is to be scheduled at a mutually convenient time and shall be completed by May 26, 2005. Discovery will remain open until June 3, 2005 for the purpose of conducting the deposition of Dr. Klein. Any report prepared by Dr. Klein shall be provided to counsel for plaintiff as soon as it is available. The request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
